description_long: This object consists of a set of seven swords, each with distinct blade shapes and handle designs, arranged in a row. The blades vary from straight, double-edged types to more exotic forms such as a wavy blade and a recurved, single-edged blade. The handles are mostly simple, with some featuring crossguards in gold or black, and one with a red accent at the guard. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the blades and a combination of wood or synthetic material for the handles, with some decorative elements on the guards. The swords are of varying lengths, with the tallest being significantly longer than the others, suggesting a mix of short swords and long swords. The overall appearance is stylized, with clean lines and minimal surface detail, suitable for display or as props in an urban-themed scenario.
description: A stylized set of seven swords with varied blade shapes and handle designs, featuring metallic blades and simple crossguards.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven swords side by side, highlighting the diversity in blade shapes and handle styles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profiles of the swords, emphasizing the flatness and straightness of most blades.
description_view_2: Rear view of the swords, displaying the backs of the blades and handles, with the arrangement mirrored from the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profiles and the alignment of the swords in a row.
attribute_blade_type: mixed: straight double-edged, wavy, recurved single-edged, triangular, and broad blades
attribute_handle_design: straight and contoured handles, some with crossguards, mostly plain with a few colored accents
attribute_ornamentation: minimal, with some colored accents on guards
